data.title: Teqball added as medal sport at 2026 Asian Games in Aichi–Nagoya, a historic milestone by International Teqball Federation.
data.description: In Budapest, Hungary on February 17, 2026, the International Teqball Federation (FITEQ) revealed a significant achievement for the sport. Teqball has now gained recognition as a medal sport at the 20th Asian Games to be held in Aichi–Nagoya in 2026. This milestone solidifies Teqball's status as a competitive sport on a global stage and represents a major step forward for the sport's presence in international competitions and events.

data.title: MSTR bought 2,486 Bitcoin for $168.4M, at an average price of $67,710 each, now holding 717,131 BTC worth $54.52B. Loss: $5.7B.
data.description: Business intelligence firm Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) has bolstered its Bitcoin holdings, acquiring 2,486 BTC for $168.4 million from February 9 to February 16 at an average price of $67,710 per coin. This latest purchase was financed through $90.5 million from common stock sales and $78.4 million from STRC preferred stock sales. Overall, Strategy now holds 717,131 BTC purchased for $54.52 billion at an average cost of $76,027 per coin, resulting in an unrealized loss of around $5.7 billion with Bitcoin currently valued at $68,000. Despite this setback, the company has significant available capital, with $7.88 billion remaining under common stock authorization and $3.54 billion under STRC. Strategy's strategy of converting equity raises into Bitcoin remains unchanged, utilizing all ATM proceeds for further purchases.

data.title: Tight correlation between mega-cap tech, software stocks & Bitcoin indicates "one trade," all weakening. IGV near $80, risk to $60.
data.description: The correlation between mega-cap tech, software stocks, and Bitcoin that led to significant gains in 2024 and 2025 has now turned into a synchronized weakness, according to Wall Street technical analyst John Roque. In a client webinar, Roque highlighted charts showing the close tracking of the Magnificent Seven, iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (IGV), and Bitcoin over the past two years. He emphasized that it all appears to be "one trade," as they all peaked in autumn 2025 and have been weakening since then, with Bitcoin and IGV showing more significant weakness. The IGV ETF is currently trading near $80, below its 40-week moving average of $106, with a technical score of zero, suggesting a risk towards $60 if oversold conditions do not trigger a rebound. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: InventHelp inventor creates K C STRAP to secure tractor trailer cabs, increasing safety for truck drivers.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Port St. Lucie, Florida, shared that the inspiration behind creating the K C STRAP stemmed from the need to secure both doors of a truck cab for personal safety while resting inside. The innovative strap design addresses this concern and offers a solution for truck drivers. The inventor highlighted the ease of releasing the strap as an important feature. The K C STRAP's design aims to enhance security and peace of mind for individuals in similar situations.

data.title: New luxury rose bush "The Most Beautiful" launched in tribute to Prince's iconic song, now available in 2026.
data.description: In commemoration of the song "The Most Beautiful Girl in the World" by Prince and in collaboration with Roses Forever, a premium rose bush has been launched in LAS VEGAS. This special rose bush pays homage to Prince's wife Mayte Garcia. The product is currently in stock and available for purchase as of February 17, 2026.

data.title: Capital Insurance Group (CIG) names 2025 agencies of the year for exceptional performance and community impact in the Western U.S.
data.description: A well-known regional property and casualty insurer, Capital Insurance Group® (CIG®), based in MONTEREY, Calif., acknowledged independent agency partners for their exceptional performance, collaboration, and positive community contributions. The recognition spans across CIG's operations in various regions. This announcement was made on Feb. 17, 2026.

data.title: Coast Packing Company announces winners of 9th Annual #LardLovers Recipe Contest celebrating National Lard Day on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Celebrating National Lard Day, the "Taste of Tradition – Heritage Recipes Reimagined" Contest recently concluded in VERNON, Calif. on Feb. 17, 2026. Coast Packing Company, a prominent supplier of animal fat shortenings in the Western US, revealed the victors of its 9th Annual competition.

data.title: Applications open for $50,000 prizes for immigrant culinary professionals and storytellers. Various roles eligible.
data.description: Attention to all immigrant professionals with expertise and creativity in the food and beverage industry: Whether you are a chef, brewer, baker, mixologist, food filmmaker, journalist, chocolatier, sommelier, historian, cheese maker, food stylist, content creator, caterer, pastry chef, food critic, distiller, culinary writer, tester, or other related occupation, we want to hear your stories and experiences. Share your unique perspectives and talents to celebrate the diverse culinary landscape. Join us in showcasing the skills and traditions of immigrants in this field.

data.title: Seek Labs awarded $2M federal grant to develop CRISPR-based avian flu therapeutic in partnership with CFIA.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, Seek Labs has been awarded a $2 million grant from USDA APHIS for their work on a mutation-resistant avian influenza therapeutic using CRISPR technology. This collaboration with CFIA aims to develop a solution to combat avian influenza in birds.

data.title: Global Elevator and Escalator Market to reach $248.9 billion by 2032 due to smart elevator adoption and modernization - Maximize Market Research.
data.description: In Pune, India on February 17, 2026, it was reported that the Global Elevator and Escalator Market is experiencing a significant shift due to factors such as increasing urban density, the uptake of smart building technology, and the renovation of older infrastructure which are redefining the priorities within vertical transportation. The market, which was valued at USD 150.4 million, is undergoing a new phase of development.

Armed group Hezbollah rejected on Tuesday the Lebanese government's decision to grant the army at least four months to advance the second phase of a nationwide disarmament plan, saying it would not accept what it sees as a move serving Israel.
